mapper.select: SELECT p.tradePostNo, p.tradeTitle, p.cost, p.status, p.createDate, ( SELECT MIN(i.tradeImgUrl) FROM tradeImage i WHERE i.tradePostNo = p.tradePostNo ) AS thumbnailUrl FROM tradePost p ORDER BY p.tradePostNo DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO secondhand (trade_title, trade_content, cost, status, member_no, create_date) VALUES (#{tradeTitle}, #{tradeContent}, #{cost}, #{status}, #{memberNo}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE secondhand SET status = #{status} WHERE trade_post_no = #{tradePostNo}
